name: PER_LOC_ADDRESS_USAGES_X
query: ( SELECT "LOC_ADDRESS_USAGE_ID","EFFECTIVE_START_DATE","EFFECTIVE_END_DATE","OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER","BUSINESS_GROUP_ID","ADDRESS_USAGE_TYPE","LOCATION_ID","ADDRESS_ID","CREATED_BY","CREATION_DATE","LAST_UPDATED_BY","LAST_UPDATE_DATE","LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN" FROM per_loc_address_usages_f WHERE TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN effective_start_date AND effective_end_date )
